meta.title: KplaWY — Never miss the play
meta.description: The first real-world instant replay app. Continuously records in the background and saves the last 22 seconds with a single tap.
meta.ogTitle: KplaWY — Instant Replay for the Real World
meta.ogDescription: Record continuously. Save the past. Never miss the play.

hero.headline: Never miss the play.
hero.subheadline: KplaWY continuously records in the background, keeping the last 22 seconds always ready. When the moment happens, just hit replay.

features.title: Technology that saves moments.
features.subtitle: Every feature is designed so you never have to worry about missing what matters.
features.f1Desc: 22-second circular buffer in memory. Zero delay. Zero storage consumption. Always recording.
features.f2Desc: Trigger replay from your Apple Watch, Galaxy Watch, or any Bluetooth button. Hands-free, total focus.
features.f3Desc: Connect multiple phones and capture the same play from different angles simultaneously.
features.f4Desc: Your replays automatically saved to Google Drive. Access from anywhere, never lose anything.
features.f5Desc: All videos stay on your device. No analytics, no tracking, no ads. Your moments are yours.
features.f6Desc: From SD to UHD with HEVC. Configure resolution, FPS, and bitrate for perfect quality.

howItWorks.title: Three steps. Zero hassle.
howItWorks.subtitle: Simple as it should be.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Point the camera and KplaWY starts continuously recording into a circular buffer in memory.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Forget about the phone. The buffer keeps the last 22 seconds always ready, without taking up space.
howItWorks.step3Desc: When something incredible happens, tap the button or use your smartwatch. The play is saved instantly.

pricing.title: Simple. No surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need to.
pricing.freeDesc: Everything you need to get started.
pricing.proDesc: For those who don't want to miss a single detail.

cta.title: Your next best play is already being recorded.
cta.subtitle: Download KplaWY and never miss a moment again.

footer.description: The first real-world instant replay app.

featuresPage.title: Features
featuresPage.headline: Every detail matters.
featuresPage.subtitle: Discover everything KplaWY offers to ensure you never miss what matters.
featuresPage.recF1Desc: The app continuously records into a circular buffer in the device's RAM. The last 22 seconds are always available to save, without consuming storage space.
featuresPage.recF2Desc: Choose between SD, HD, Full HD, and UHD. Configure FPS, bitrate, and codec (H.264 or HEVC) for the perfect balance between quality and performance.
featuresPage.recF3Desc: Switch between cameras with a single tap. Support for multiple rear lenses with optical zoom (0.5x, 1x, 2x) and digital pinch-to-zoom.
featuresPage.recF4Desc: Configure audio source, input device, and mixing volume. Monitor audio status in real-time through the HUD.
featuresPage.remF1Desc: One tap on your wrist and the replay is saved. Visual and haptic feedback confirm the play was captured.
featuresPage.remF2Desc: Compatible with Galaxy Watch via Wearable Data Layer. Identical interface to Apple Watch with clear visual states.
featuresPage.remF3Desc: Connect any Bluetooth button (like AB Shutter3) to trigger replays. Perfect for tripod and hands-free recording.
featuresPage.remF4Desc: Use another phone as a remote control with real-time preview of the main camera. See the framing and trigger replay from a distance.
featuresPage.manF1Desc: All your replays organized by date. Search, filter by duration or camera, mark favorites, and share.
featuresPage.manF2Desc: Play frame by frame, adjust speed from 0.25x to 2x, skip forward and backward 5 seconds.
featuresPage.manF3Desc: Automatic backup of your clips to Google Drive. Smart organization by date. Access from any device.
featuresPage.manF4Desc: Track how many replays you've saved, total recording time, storage usage, and distribution by camera.
featuresPage.expF1Desc: Adaptive interface with dark theme (pure black) and light theme (pure white). The same premium experience in any lighting condition.
featuresPage.expF2Desc: Camera overlays with essential information that automatically disappear after 5 seconds to avoid distraction.
featuresPage.expF3Desc: Dims the preview to save battery during long recordings, with slide-to-unlock gesture to reactivate.
featuresPage.expF4Desc: No data leaves your device without your permission. No analytics, no tracking, no ads. Your moments are yours alone.

aboutPage.title: About
aboutPage.headline: Born from a missed play.
aboutPage.story1: It all started with a goal nobody filmed. That perfect moment that existed for a second — and disappeared forever.
aboutPage.story2: KplaWY was born from that frustration. From the idea that technology should let us save what already happened, not just what's to come.
aboutPage.story3: We built an app that works as a personal DVR. It continuously records in the background, keeping the last 22 seconds always ready. When the moment happens, you don't need to have reacted in time — just hit replay.
aboutPage.story4: Every detail of KplaWY was designed for those who live the moment and don't want to rely on luck to capture it.
aboutPage.missionText: Ensure that no important moment is ever lost. Never again.
aboutPage.val1Text: Your videos never leave your device without your permission.
aboutPage.val2Text: One button. One tap. Play saved.
aboutPage.val3Text: Native high-performance technology on iOS and Android.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.headline: Questions? We're here.
faqPage.a1: KplaWY is a real-world instant replay app. It continuously records into a 22-second circular buffer in the device's memory. When something important happens, you press a button and the last 22 seconds are saved as a permanent clip.
faqPage.q2: Does the app use a lot of storage?
faqPage.a2: No. The circular buffer records to RAM, not storage. Only the replays you save take up space on the device.
faqPage.q3: Can I use my Apple Watch or Galaxy Watch?
faqPage.a3: Yes. KplaWY is compatible with Apple Watch and Galaxy Watch. With one tap on your wrist, the replay is saved instantly.
faqPage.a4: Multi-Camera mode allows you to connect multiple phones via local network to record the same moment from multiple angles simultaneously. It's a KplaWY Pro feature.
faqPage.q5: Are my videos sent to any server?
faqPage.a5: No. All videos stay exclusively on your device. The only external upload is the optional Google Drive backup, which goes to your own account.
faqPage.q6: Do I need internet to use the app?
faqPage.a6: No. Recording and replay work 100% offline. Internet is only needed for login, subscription, and cloud backup.
faqPage.q7: What's the difference between Free and Pro?
faqPage.a7: The Free plan includes continuous recording, replay, smartwatch and Bluetooth control, and unlimited clips. Pro adds multi-camera, remote control with live preview, automatic cloud backup, advanced statistics, and customization.
faqPage.q8: How does the KplaWY Pro trial work?
faqPage.a8: You can try all Pro features free for 7 days. No credit card required to get started.

supportPage.title: Support
supportPage.headline: How can we help?
supportPage.subtitle: We're here to make sure your KplaWY experience is perfect.
supportPage.issue1Solution: Check that camera and microphone permissions are enabled in your device settings.
supportPage.issue2Solution: Make sure Bluetooth is active and the KplaWY app is installed on the watch. Restart both devices.
supportPage.issue3Solution: Check storage access permission. Clips are saved in the app folder and can be exported to the gallery.
supportPage.issue4Solution: Check your internet connection and if your Google account is connected. Backup can be paused on mobile data (configurable).
supportPage.contactTitle: Didn't find what you're looking for?
supportPage.contactText: Contact us by email and we'll respond as soon as possible.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.headline: Get in touch.
contactPage.subtitle: Questions, suggestions, or feedback — we'd love to hear from you.
contactPage.formError: Failed to send. Please try again.

downloadPage.headline: Ready to never miss the play?
downloadPage.subtitle: Available for iOS and Android. Download now and start capturing your best moments.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.s1Text: The KplaWY application ("App") is developed by Kaway ("we", "our"). This privacy policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacyPage.s2aItem1: Videos and audio: The App continuously records video and audio into a temporary buffer on your device. Saved replays are stored exclusively on your device.
privacyPage.s2aItem2: Preferences: Your settings (resolution, FPS, buffer duration, etc.) are saved locally via SharedPreferences.
privacyPage.s2bItem1: Google Drive: If you choose to use cloud backup, your clips will be sent to your Google Drive account. We use Google Sign-In only for authentication and the Google Drive API for upload. We do not have access to your Google password.
privacyPage.s2bItem2: Local network: The App may create a WebSocket server on the local network to allow remote control by other devices. No data is sent to the internet.
privacyPage.s3Item1: Camera and Microphone: For video and audio recording.
privacyPage.s3Item2: Storage: To save replays to the device gallery.
privacyPage.s3Item3: Bluetooth: For communication with Bluetooth remote controls and smartwatches (Galaxy Watch, Apple Watch).
privacyPage.s3Item4: Internet: For optional Google Drive backup.
privacyPage.s3Item5: Local Network: For remote control functionality via WebSocket.
privacyPage.s4Item1: We do not collect personally identifiable data.
privacyPage.s4Item2: We do not send your videos or audio to our servers.
privacyPage.s4Item3: We do not use analytics or tracking services.
privacyPage.s4Item4: We do not share your data with third parties.
privacyPage.s5Text: The App can connect with Galaxy Watch (via Wearable Data Layer) and Apple Watch (via WatchConnectivity) for remote control functionality. Communication occurs directly between devices, without passing through external servers.
privacyPage.s6Item1: All data is stored locally on your device.
privacyPage.s6Item2: Smartwatch communication uses native operating system protocols.
privacyPage.s6Item3: WebSocket communication occurs only on the local network.
privacyPage.s6Item4: Google Drive backup uses OAuth 2.0 authentication.
privacyPage.s7Item1: Delete all replays saved by the App.
privacyPage.s7Item3: Uninstall the App, which removes all local data.
privacyPage.s8Text: We may update this privacy policy periodically. We recommend that you review this page regularly.
privacyPage.s9Text: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact:

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.notice: This document is currently being drafted. Final terms will be published soon. For questions, please contact us at the email below.
termsPage.s1Text: By downloading, installing, or using the KplaWY application ("App"), you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, do not use the App.
termsPage.s2Text: KplaWY is an instant replay application that continuously records video into a circular buffer in the device's memory, allowing you to save the last 22 seconds as a permanent clip.
termsPage.s3Text: The App is intended exclusively for personal and non-commercial use. You are responsible for all content captured through the App and must comply with applicable laws, including privacy and image rights legislation.
termsPage.s4Text: Basic features are free. Advanced features (KplaWY Pro) require a subscription. Price details and conditions will be presented at the time of purchase within the App.
termsPage.s5Text: The App, including code, design, brand, and logo, is the property of Kaway. Content you create (videos and clips) remains your property.
termsPage.s6Text: The App is provided "as is." We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability or absence of errors. We are not responsible for data loss resulting from misuse, device failures, or circumstances beyond our control.
termsPage.s7Text: The use of personal data is governed by our Privacy Policy, available on a separate page on this website.
termsPage.s8Text: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Significant changes will be communicated through the App or this website.
termsPage.s9Text: For questions about these terms, please contact:
termsPage.reviewNote: [NOTE: This document should be reviewed by a legal professional before final publication.]
